message:
refactor(pager): condvar-based snapshot publication and TransactionHandle extensions

Pager (pager.rs):
- Replace spin-loop-based published snapshot waiting with Condvar-based
  parking (PUBLISHED_SNAPSHOT_WAIT_SLICE).  Eliminates busy-waiting that
  burned CPU cycles during concurrent snapshot reads.
- Add write_page_requires_page_one_conflict_tracking() to
  TransactionHandle — allows the VDBE engine to query whether a page
  write will touch page-1 metadata (allocator / freelist), enabling the
  concurrent write fast path to conditionally skip page-one tracking.
- Extend pending_commit_pages() API for concurrent commit planning.

Traits (traits.rs):
- Add write_page_requires_page_one_conflict_tracking() and
  pending_commit_pages() to the TransactionHandle trait so the MVCC
  layer can query pager-level metadata without coupling to concrete
  pager internals.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
